title: Proposed change to podman machine rm --force
body: I would like to propose a small change to `podman machine rm --force`.  The help text says `--force` means *Do not prompt before rming*.  I would like to add that `--force` would stop the machine (it does not today) and remove it without prompts.  Would anyone have a conniption fit?

comments.body: No that would seem to be what humans would expect.
